scripts.check-branch: powershell -Command "$branch = git branch --show-current; if ($branch -ne 'main') { Write-Error 'Deploy only allowed on main branch'; exit 1 }"
scripts.deploy-major: npm run check-branch && npm version major -m v%s
scripts.deploy-minor: npm run check-branch && npm version minor -m v%s
scripts.deploy-patch: npm run check-branch && npm version patch -m v%s
scripts.postversion: git push origin && git push origin --tags
scripts.preversion: npm run sonar && npm run trivy
